title: Build broken: LICHEN Kconfig not sourced correctly
description: west build fails with 'undefined symbol LICHEN' for all boards. The lichen/zephyr/module.yml has 'kconfig: Kconfig' but Zephyr is sourcing lichen/Kconfig (wrong path) instead of lichen/zephyr/Kconfig. This may be related to west manifest self-reference vs module path resolution. Previously claimed working at commit a24db525 - may need west update or module.yml fix.
close_reason: Verified fixed: fresh Zephyr build now sources lichen/zephyr/Kconfig and qemu_cortex_m3 bridge build completes without undefined CONFIG_LICHEN.
